payload.answer: The new information is a likely temporal update to the existing project state: an MVP for the Brain Slack agent is now implemented. Treat the earlier "planned, status=open" state as superseded for the MVP scope, while preserving ambiguity about whether the full project is complete.
citations: Existing: "The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open"
New: "The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented"

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement appears to refer to a scoped milestone (MVP) of the existing Brain Slack agent project, suggesting a temporal status progression, but it does not unambiguously prove the entire project is fully implemented.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.

details: Detected status progression from planned/open to implemented.
Identified scope mismatch between project-level entity and MVP-level entity.
Avoided asserting full project completion because the new fact is explicitly limited to the MVP.

repair_options: Archive or mark the prior "planned/open" status as no longer current for the MVP scope.
Store the new fact as an implemented milestone under the Brain Slack agent project rather than as full project completion.
If the system requires a single current project status, request clarification on whether the whole Brain Slack agent or only its MVP is implemented.
